note: never use for training; decontaminate against train sets
description: Held-out GENERALITY probe set. DELIBERATELY contains NO provenance/attribution/source-discipline tasks. These measure raw capability (abstraction, multi-step reasoning, analogy, out-of-domain transfer) so that gate pass-rate + wall-clock cannot be Goodharted as a stand-in for 'getting more capable'. Scored deterministically (exact/numeric/regex) against gold — NO LLM judge.

tasks.prompt:
Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 2, 4, 8, 16, 32, ?
Reply with only the number.

Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, ?
Reply with only the number.

Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 1, 4, 9, 16, 25, ?
Reply with only the number.

In an ARC-style grid, a row is recolored by mapping each cell to the color directly to its right (the last cell wraps to the first). Input row colors: [A, B, C, D]. Output the resulting row as four space-separated letters.
Tiny grid puzzle: a 2x2 grid is rotated 90 degrees clockwise. Input rows are 'a b' (top) and 'c d' (bottom). Give the top row of the rotated grid as two space-separated letters.
Next number in the sequence: 3, 6, 11, 18, 27, ? (differences increase by 2 each step). Reply with only the number.

A 1-D cellular row applies the rule: each cell becomes 1 if exactly one of its two neighbors is 1, else 0 (ends have a single neighbor counted, the missing side treated as 0). Input: 0 1 0 0 1. Output the next row as five space-separated digits.
A train travels 60 km in the first hour and 80 km in the second hour. What is its average speed over the two hours, in km/h? Reply with only the number.
A shirt costs $40. It is discounted 25%, then sales tax of 8% is added to the discounted price. What is the final price in dollars? Reply with only the number (no dollar sign).
Anna has 3 boxes with 12 apples each and gives away 7 apples. How many apples does she have left? Reply with only the number.
If 5 machines make 5 widgets in 5 minutes, how many minutes do 100 machines take to make 100 widgets? Reply with only the number.
A rectangle is 7 cm wide and 4 cm tall. What is its area in square centimeters? Reply with only the number.
You buy 3 coffees at $2.50 each and pay with a $20 bill. How much change do you get in dollars? Reply with only the number.
A tank holds 240 liters. It drains at 8 liters per minute. How many minutes until it is empty? Reply with only the number.
All bloops are razzies. All razzies are lazzies. Are all bloops definitely lazzies? Answer yes or no.
Tom is taller than Sara. Sara is taller than Mike. Who is the shortest of the three? Reply with only the name.
If it is raining then the ground is wet. The ground is NOT wet. Is it raining? Answer yes or no.
Five people sit in a row. Cara is in the middle seat (seat 3 of 5). There are equal numbers of people on each side of her. How many people sit to her left? Reply with only the number.
A bat and a ball cost $1.10 in total. The bat costs $1.00 more than the ball. How much does the ball cost in dollars? Reply with only the number (no dollar sign).
Some cats are black. No black things glow. Can we conclude that some cats do not glow? Answer yes or no.
Hot is to cold as up is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Finger is to hand as leaf is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Puppy is to dog as kitten is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Day is to night as summer is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Author is to book as composer is to ___? Reply with a single word.
2 is to 8 as 3 is to ___? (the rule is cube). Reply with only the number.
Decode this Caesar-shifted word (each letter shifted forward by 1): 'gdkkn'. Reply with only the decoded word.
Reverse the string 'stressed' and reply with only the resulting word.
In the made-up language Zubi, 'mi ka' means 'red ball' and 'mi tu' means 'red box'. What word means 'red'? Reply with a single word.
Convert binary 1011 to a decimal integer. Reply with only the number.

You have a 3-liter jug and a 5-liter jug and unlimited water. What is the smallest number of liters greater than zero you can measure exactly into a container using only these jugs? Reply with only the number.
How many times does the letter 'r' appear in the word 'strawberry'? Reply with only the number.
Sort these numbers in ascending order and give them space-separated: 4 1 3 2.
A standard six-sided die shows 6 on top. What number is on the bottom face (opposite faces of a standard die sum to 7)? Reply with only the number.

Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 5, 10, 20, 40, 80, ?
Reply with only the number.
Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ? (each term is n times n+1). Reply with only the number.
Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 1, 3, 6, 10, 15, ? (triangular numbers). Reply with only the number.

A row of 5 cells is shifted one position to the right; the rightmost cell wraps around to the leftmost position. Input cells: [P, Q, R, S, T]. Output the resulting row as five space-separated letters.
Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 100, 81, 64, 49, 36, ? (descending squares). Reply with only the number.
A 3x3 grid is reflected across its vertical axis (left-right mirror). The top row reads 'g h j' from left to right. Give the top row after the mirror as three space-separated letters.
Continue this integer sequence with the next single number: 1, 2, 4, 7, 11, 16, ? (differences increase by 1 each step). Reply with only the number.
A book has 320 pages. You read 40 pages a day for 5 days. How many pages are left? Reply with only the number.
A car uses 6 liters of fuel per 100 km. How many liters does it use over a 250 km trip? Reply with only the number.
A class has 28 students. Three quarters of them passed a test. How many students passed? Reply with only the number.
You deposit $500 at 4% simple annual interest. How many dollars of interest do you earn after 3 years? Reply with only the number.
A recipe needs 3 eggs to make 12 muffins. How many eggs are needed to make 40 muffins? Reply with only the number.
A worker earns $18 per hour and works 7 hours, then gets a $10 bonus. What are the total earnings in dollars? Reply with only the number.
A rope is 12 meters long. You cut off two pieces, each 2.5 meters long. How many meters of rope remain? Reply with only the number.
Every dax is a wug. No wug is a fim. Can a dax be a fim? Answer yes or no.
Liam is older than Noah. Noah is older than Ava. Ava is older than Mia. Who is the oldest of the four? Reply with only the name.
If a switch is ON then the light is on. The light is off. Is the switch ON? Answer yes or no.
There are 4 red marbles and some blue marbles in a bag. If there are 11 marbles in total, how many are blue? Reply with only the number.
Two pencils and one eraser cost $5 in total. One pencil costs $2. How much does the eraser cost in dollars? Reply with only the number (no dollar sign).
All robins are birds. Some birds cannot fly. Does it follow that some robins cannot fly? Answer yes or no.
Four runners finish a race. Beth finishes before Dan. Dan finishes before Eve. Carl finishes after Eve. Who finishes last? Reply with only the name.
A jar holds only green and yellow buttons. Exactly one third of the buttons are green. If there are 6 green buttons, how many buttons are in the jar total? Reply with only the number.
Wet is to dry as full is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Bird is to nest as bee is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Glove is to hand as sock is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Teacher is to school as doctor is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Loud is to quiet as fast is to ___? Reply with a single word.
5 is to 25 as 7 is to ___? (the rule is square). Reply with only the number.
Calf is to cow as foal is to ___? Reply with a single word.
Decode this Caesar-shifted word (each letter shifted forward by 1): 'bnld'. Reply with only the decoded word.
Reverse the string 'level' and reply with only the resulting word.
In the made-up language Florp, 'ka lo' means 'big tree' and 'ka mi' means 'big rock'. What word means 'big'? Reply with a single word.
Convert binary 1101 to a decimal integer. Reply with only the number.
How many times does the letter 'o' appear in the word 'kangaroo'? Reply with only the number.
Sort these numbers in descending order and give them space-separated: 3 7 1 5.
Convert the decimal number 6 to binary. Reply with only the binary digits.
